scripts.analyze:smoke: PYTHONPATH=src python -m masters_optimizer.cli run --config config/real_data_smoke.json --output output/redesign_smoke
scripts.analyze:full: PYTHONPATH=src python -m masters_optimizer.cli run --config config/real_data_example.json --output output/redesign_full
scripts.analyze:regression: PYTHONPATH=src python -m masters_optimizer.cli regression --config config/real_data_smoke.json | tee output/redesign_smoke/regression_report.json
